name: @tebru/elm-design
description: Dev-tooling manifest for the tebru/elm-design Elm design system. Elm consumers never install this — they consume the committed Elm modules + CSS artifacts (source-directories / git submodule). This file only pins the codegen/test/lint toolchain.

scripts.test:codegen: node --test codegen/generate.test.js codegen/generate-inventory.test.js codegen/emit-css.test.js codegen/bundle-css.test.js codegen/check-bespoke-sync.test.js codegen/check-palette.test.js codegen/generate-icons.test.js
scripts.format: elm-format src/Tebru/Component/ src/Tebru/Box.elm src/Tebru/Icon.elm src/Tebru/Theme/Config.elm src/Tebru/Theme/Spacing.elm tests/ --validate
scripts.format:fix: elm-format src/Tebru/Component/ src/Tebru/Box.elm src/Tebru/Icon.elm src/Tebru/Theme/Config.elm src/Tebru/Theme/Spacing.elm tests/ --yes
